summary: Completed testing for Per-Agency Module Management, Branding Restriction, and Agency Profile features. All 8 backend API tests pass. All 4 frontend tests pass.
passed_tests: ✅ PUT /api/admin/agencies/{agency_id}/modules - saves allowed_modules list, returns updated data
✅ GET /api/agency/profile - returns agency_id, name, allowed_modules for logged-in agency user
✅ All module endpoints require admin auth (401 without token)
✅ All whitelabel endpoints require admin auth (401 without token)
✅ Agency profile endpoint requires auth (401 without token)
✅ Frontend: /app/admin/agency-modules page loads with list of 3 agencies
✅ Frontend: Clicking agency card expands to show checkbox grid with 22 module toggles
✅ Frontend: 'Acente Modulleri' menu item visible in admin sidebar under YÖNETİM
✅ Frontend: AdminBrandingPage shows company_name field as editable for super_admin (can_edit_name=true)
critical_code_review_comments: Agency modules endpoint correctly validates agency exists before returning/updating modules
Whitelabel settings properly checks is_super for can_edit_name flag
Agency profile endpoint properly returns allowed_modules from agency document
Frontend AdminAgencyModulesPage has proper data-testid attributes for automated testing
seed_data_creation: None needed - used existing Demo Acenta (f5f7a2a3-5de1-4d65-b700-ec4f9807d83a)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new features tested: 1) Per-agency module management via GET/PUT /api/admin/agencies/{id}/modules - allows admin to configure which modules/tabs each agency can see via checkbox UI. 2) Branding restriction - whitelabel-settings endpoint returns can_edit_name based on super_admin role; non-super_admin users see company_name as readonly in UI. 3) Agency profile endpoint GET /api/agency/profile - returns agency info with allowed_modules for logged-in agency users. Test agency 'Demo Acenta' has agency_id=agency-admin-portal-1 with allowed_modules=['dashboard','rezervasyonlar','sheet_baglantilari','musaitlik_takibi'].

api_verification.GET /api/agency/profile: ✅ 200 - Returns agency_id, name, allowed_modules for agency user
api_verification.GET /api/admin/whitelabel-settings: ✅ 200 - Returns settings with can_edit_name=true for super_admin
api_verification.Auth checks: ✅ All endpoints return 401/error without valid auth token

frontend_verification.Sidebar Menu: 'Acente Modulleri' visible under YÖNETİM section with CheckSquare icon
frontend_verification.Agency Cards: 3 agency cards displayed with expand/collapse functionality
frontend_verification.Module Grid: 22 module toggle checkboxes organized in groups (TEMEL, MÜŞTERİ İLİŞKİLERİ, B2B AĞ, FİNANS, OPERASYON)
frontend_verification.Actions: 'Tumunu Sec' (Select All), 'Tumunu Kaldir' (Clear All), 'Kaydet' (Save) buttons present
frontend_verification.data-testid attributes: All present: company-name-input, logo-url-input, color-picker, save-branding-btn

notes: Rate limiting was encountered during testing (5 min cooldown for /api/auth/login). Tests were completed using existing valid tokens. The branding restriction for non-super_admin users showing readonly company_name field is implemented in frontend but could not be directly tested as we only have super_admin and agency_admin test users (agency_admin cannot access /admin/branding page).
